Project Alder — Non-binding Term Sheet for the proposed acquisition of Lymaris Technologies S.A. (Euronext Paris) by Ardentis Capital S.à r.l. (Luxembourg).
Lymaris Technologies S.A., RCS Paris 2099 B 000123, SIREN 812 345 678, VAT FR12 812345678, registered office: 10 Allée des Fenêtres Bleues, 75099 Paris, France; LEI 529900NOTREALABCDE12.
Ardentis Capital S.à r.l., RCS Luxembourg B 909090, VAT LU11223344, siège: 2 Rue du Soleil, L-9090 Holburg, Grand-Duché de Luxembourg; contact: deal@ardentis.example.lu.
Consideration: €18.40 per LYM share (all-cash), representing a 28% premium; this constitutes inside information under EU MAR and is not for public disclosure prior to cleansing.
Financing sources include a bridge facility with escrow at Banque Imaginaire (FR), IBAN FR00 1000 2000 3000 4000 5000 601, BIC BIMAFRPPXXX.
Issuer IR contact: ir@lymaris.example.fr; Tel: +33 1 86 99 77 55; registered email for notices: corporate.secretariat@lymaris.example.fr.
KYC point: Mr. Adrien Joubert (Director), Passport (FR) AA1234567, contact address: 41 Chemin des Étoiles, 69099 Lyon, France.
Role contact only: Data Protection Officer, dpo@lymaris.example.fr; Name: [to be appointed]; generic intake email: name@example.com.
Non-actionable bait: Public helpline +33 800 000 000 is not a party contact and must not be used for notice or diligence purposes.
Personal data processing: Parties will process contact details under GDPR Art.6(1)(b); no Art.9 special-category data will be sought, and any incidental special-category elements will be redacted before transfer.
Cross-border transfers: any export of PII to non-EEA service providers (including a UK-hosted VDR) will use 2021 SCCs plus a transfer impact assessment and strong encryption at rest and in transit.
Sustainability undertakings: Lymaris will provide CSRD ESRS E1–E5 datapoints and SFDR principal adverse impact indicators and taxonomy-alignment assumptions used in diligence; no marketing of SFDR Art.9 products is contemplated.
MAR compliance: wall-crossed insiders will be listed on an AMF-compliant insider list (capturing phone/email and passport identifiers) and subject to blackout from signing until a cleansing announcement on Euronext Paris.
Conditions precedent: AMF clearance for the offer document, works council consultation, financing documents finalisation, and absence of a material adverse effect; governing law: French law; notices via secure VDR plus ir@lymaris.example.fr.
